creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This program scans directories of your choosing, then displays a graph
which emphasizes the subdirectories where the largest files are kept.  
You can browse the graph to take a closer look at particular areas.  
PostScript output is available.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/xdiskusage.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
